arts.ttl: Four Liverpool players at risk of Champions League suspension ahead of PSG clash
arts.sum: Liverpool quartet will miss second leg at Anfield if they are shown a yellow card in Paris

arts.ttl: Mohamed Salah told what he must do at Liverpool to beat Kylian Mbappe to Ballon d'Or award
arts.sum: Liverpool star Mohamed Salah is among the top contenders to win this year's Ballon d'Or - but pundits believe he must do one thing to put the result beyond doubt.

arts.ttl: PSG Encouraged to Outbid Arsenal in Transfer Race for Inter Milan Target With €6M-per-Year Offer
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain have been monitoring Bayern Munich midfielder Joshua Kimmich for months and almost signed him last summer. Now, they’re making another push to land him, with one pundit urging them to secure the veteran. Journalist Christian Falk recently reported that PSG’s interest in Kimmich is still strong, especially since his contract situation at Bayern […] The post PSG Encouraged to Outbid Arsenal in Transfer Race for Inter Milan Target With €6M-per-Year Offer appeared first on PSG Talk.

arts.ttl: Liverpool can achieve a modern first by proving Arne Slot’s claim
arts.sum: Before facing Paris Saint-Germain, Slot said Liverpool can’t be referred to as the best team in Europe without winning the Champions League

arts.ttl: For Trent Alexander-Arnold and Andy Robertson, Liverpool’s famous full-back duo, this might be the last dance
arts.sum: After seven years flourishing on opposite sides of the pitch, Liverpool’s hugely successful double act – who face PSG on Wednesday night – could be playing their final Champions League campaign together

arts.ttl: Revealed: Liverpool & Newcastle eyeing €45m star who nearly joined Arsenal
arts.sum: Liverpool and Newcastle United are now among the suitors for the potential transfer of Bayern Munich winger Kingsley Coman ahead of the summer. arts.ttl: PSG's post-Mbappe era, no 'clans' and foreign stars' French buy-in
arts.sum: Liverpool face a Paris St-Germain side in the Champions League who are hitting their best form of the post-Kylian Mbappe era.

arts.ttl: Newcastle suffer another major Carabao Cup final blow with second player missing vs Liverpool
arts.sum: Liverpool take on Newcastle United in the Carabao Cup later this month, but Eddie Howe's Magpies are going to be without two key players.
